name: test_create_post[TC_POST_CREATE_003-data2]
description:
POST /posts — parametrized across 3 create scenarios:
          TC_POST_CREATE_001: short payload with userId 1
          TC_POST_CREATE_002: short payload with userId 5
          TC_POST_CREATE_003: long title + body payload

        Verifies 201, all expected fields present, echoed values,
        and schema compliance for each case.
descriptionHtml:
POST /posts — parametrized across 3 create scenarios:
      TC_POST_CREATE_001: short payload with userId 1
      TC_POST_CREATE_002: short payload with userId 5
      TC_POST_CREATE_003: long title + body payload

    Verifies 201, all expected fields present, echoed values,
    and schema compliance for each case.

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: {'id': 'TC_POST_CREATE_003', 'description': 'Create post with long title and body', 'payload': {'userId': 2, 'title': 'A Very Long Title That Tests The Limits Of The Title Field In The API', 'body': 'A very long body that simulates a real blog post with multiple sentences. It goes on and on to test how the API handles larger payloads gracefully.'}, 'expected_status': 201, 'expect_fields': ['userId', 'title', 'body', 'id']}

parameterValues: {'id': 'TC_POST_CREATE_003', 'description': 'Create post with long title and body', 'payload': {'userId': 2, 'title': 'A Very Long Title That Tests The Limits Of The Title Field In The API', 'body': 'A very long body that simulates a real blog post with multiple sentences. It goes on and on to test how the API handles larger payloads gracefully.'}, 'expected_status': 201, 'expect_fields': ['userId', 'title', 'body', 'id']}
